name: SysAid ITSM API
what_it_does: SysAid REST API for IT service management platform with AI-powered automation. Enables AI agents to manage IT support tickets and service requests, handle asset and configuration management, automate change management workflows, access knowledge base articles, track SLA compliance, manage self-service portal requests, integrate with monitoring and DevOps tools, and automate routine IT service tasks.
use_cases: Managing IT tickets and automated routing from service desk agents
Tracking IT assets and CMDB data from configuration management agents
Monitoring SLA compliance and escalating tickets from IT operations agents
Integrating ITSM data with monitoring and alerting systems from DevOps agents
not_for: MSP multi-client management without single-tenant ITSM focus
Enterprise ITSM at the scale of ServiceNow without mid-market positioning
Customer-facing CRM without internal IT service management workflows
best_when: A mid-market IT department using SysAid wants AI agents to automate ticket triage, asset management, change requests, and SLA monitoring with built-in AI capabilities.
avoid_when: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: IT asset and change management capabilities require appropriate authorization controls. Automated IT changes must follow change management processes.

auth.notes: SysAid uses API key and OAuth 2.0. Account-level credentials. API available on all plans. Developer documentation available. Both SaaS and on-premises deployments supported.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; free trial available
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-agent pricing; Help Desk, ITSM, and ITSM+ plans with AI features on higher tiers
pricing.notes: Israeli company (Tel Aviv). Founded 1994. Mid-market ITSM with AI-native automation (SysAid Copilot). On-premises and SaaS. 4,000+ customers globally.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: IT asset and change management automation requires authorization controls
No public MCP server — REST API with API key or OAuth2
Israeli company — EU and US data residency options; GDPR compliant
No granular OAuth scopes — verify access control model
On-premises vs SaaS have different API configurations
AI Copilot built in — verify overlap with custom agent automation to avoid duplication
agent_readiness.security_notes: IT asset and service management data. ISO27001, GDPR, SOC2. API key and OAuth2. US/EU data residency. Israeli company. Built-in AI Copilot.

security_score_components.security_notes: IT service and asset management data. ISO27001, GDPR, SOC2. API key and OAuth2. US/EU data residency. Israeli company.
